text: Walking through these halls, I am struck by a feeling of openness and clarity, the minimalist space inviting contemplation. The presence of safety equipment quietly reassures me. Moving into the second scene, bright colors and stimulating text spark curiosity. Surrounded by ideas of research and development, I feel inspired—reminded of humanity's eternal quest to understand and innovate, and my own small place within it. There is an energy here: the hum of progress and inquiry.
